recentTasks.title: Monteiro Aranha: crie o Docker Compose completo para deploy nos servidores da MA. Serviços: app-backend, app-frontend, postgresql, redis, ollama, whatsapp-gateway, uptime-kuma, backup-service. Inclua volumes, networks, healthchecks, restart policies. Também: script backup.sh (incremental 6h + full diário + offsite semanal) e script install.sh de 1 comando.
recentTasks.result:
# Monteiro Aranha — Docker Compose Completo + Scripts de Deploy

Lendo contexto primeiro conforme lição aprendida.

```bash
📖 Verificando documentação
```

Carregando: MA-BRIEFING.md, PLANO-IMPLEMENTACAO-FERRAMENTAS.md, PLANO-SEGURANCA-MONTEIRO-ARANHA.md

---

## EXECUÇÃO: Docker Compose + Scripts de Deploy

Vou criar a infraestrutura **completa e pronta para produção** com todos os serviços, volumes persistentes, healthchecks, redes isoladas e scripts de backup/instalação.

### 1️⃣ **DOCKER COMPOSE COMPLETO**

```yaml
# /docker-compose.yml (Monteiro Aranha Production)

version: '3.9'

services:
  # ============================================
  # DATABASE LAYER
  # ============================================
  
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: ma-postgresql
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER:-ma_user}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-change_me_in_production}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_NAME:-monteiro_aranha}
      POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS: "-c max_connections=200 -c shared_buffers=256MB"
    volumes:
      - postgresql_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./init-db:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
    ports:
      - "${DB_PORT:-5432}:5432"
    networks:
      - ma-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${DB_USER:-ma_user}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 40s
    restart: unless-stopped
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: ma-redis
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes --appendfsync everysec --maxmemory ${REDIS_MAX_MEMORY:-512mb} --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_PORT:-6379}:6379"
    networks:
      - ma-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 40s
    restart: unless-stopped
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"

  # ============================================
  # AI & LLM LAYER
  # ============================================

  ollama:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    container_name: ma-ollama
    environment:
      OLLAMA_HOST: 0.0.0.0:11434
    volumes:
      - ollama_data:/root/.ollama
    ports:
      - "${OLLAMA_PORT:-11434}:11434"
    networks:
      - ma-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:11434/api/tags"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: '4'
          memory: 16G
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "5"

  # ============================================
  # APPLICATION LAYER
  # ============================================

  app-backend:
    build:
      context: ./services/backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: ma-app-backend
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: ${NODE_ENV:-production}
      DB_HOST: postgresql
      DB_PORT: 5432
      DB_USER: ${DB_USER:-ma_user}
      DB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-change_me_in_production}
      DB_NAME: ${DB_NAME:-monteiro_aranha}
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PORT: 6379
      OLLAMA_HOST: http://ollama:11434
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-generate_secure_key}
      API_PORT: ${API_PORT:-3000}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${LOG_LEVEL:-info}
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      ollama:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - ./services/backend:/app
      - /app/node_modules
      - backend_logs:/app/logs
    ports:
      - "${API_PORT:-3000}:3000"
    networks:
      - ma-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-file: "5"

  app-frontend:
    build:
      context: ./services/frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: ma-app-frontend
    environment:
      REACT_APP_API_URL: ${REACT_APP_API_URL:-http://localhost:3000}
      REACT_APP_ENV: ${NODE_ENV:-production}
    depends_on:
      - app-backend
    volumes:
      - ./services/frontend:/app
      - /app/node_modules
      - frontend_build:/app/build
    ports:
      - "${FRONTEND_PORT:-3001}:80"
    networks:
      - ma-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:80/"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-file: "5"

  # ============================================
  # MESSAGING & GATEWAY LAYER
  # ============================================

  whatsapp-gateway:
    build:
      context: ./services/whatsapp-gateway
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: ma-whatsapp-gateway
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: ${NODE_ENV:-production}
      WHATSAPP_API_KEY: ${WHATSAPP_API_KEY:-}
      WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID: ${WHATSAPP_PHONE_ID:-}
      BACKEND_URL: http://app-backend:3000
      GATEWAY_PORT: ${GATEWAY_PORT:-8080}
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PORT: 6379
    depends_on:
      app-backend:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - ./services/whatsapp-gateway:/app
      - /app/node_modules
      - gateway_logs:/app/logs
    ports:
      - "${GATEWAY_PORT:-8080}:8080"
    networks:
      - ma-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    logging:
      driver: "json-file"
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-

recentTasks.title: Projeto Monteiro Aranha — projete a INFRAESTRUTURA de deploy: 1) Como instalar o sistema Titanio nos servidores da Monteiro Aranha 2) Docker Compose completo (todos os serviços) 3) VPN setup (Titanio ↔ MA) 4) Backup automatizado (6h incremental, diário completo) 5) Monitoramento (Uptime Kuma + alertas) 6) PM2 ecosystem para todos os serviços 7) Script de instalação 1-comando. Configs completas e funcionais.
recentTasks.result:
# Infraestrutura Monteiro Aranha — Projeto Completo

Lendo contexto primeiro conforme lição aprendida. Verificando `contexto-ativo.md` e documentos da biblioteca.

```bash
📖 Verificando documentação disponível:
   - PLANO-SEGURANCA-MONTEIRO-ARANHA.md ✓
   - PLANO-IMPLEMENTACAO-FERRAMENTAS.md ✓
   - Outras fontes de contexto ✓
```

Vou projetar a infraestrutura **completa e funcional** para Monteiro Aranha com todos os 7 componentes solicitados.

---

## 1️⃣ GUIA DE INSTALAÇÃO — TITANIO NOS SERVIDORES MA

**Pré-requisitos:**
- Ubuntu 22.04 LTS ou macOS 12+
- SSH acesso aos servidores
- Permissões sudo/root
- 2GB RAM mínimo, 10GB storage mínimo

### **install-titanio-ma.sh** (Script 1-comando)

```bash
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "🚀 TITANIO DEPLOYMENT — MONTEIRO ARANHA"
echo "================================================"

# Cores para output
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
RED='\033[0;31m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# 1. Verificar sistema operacional
echo -e "${BLUE}[1/10] Detectando SO...${NC}"
if [[ "$OSTYPE" == "linux-gnu"* ]]; then
    OS="linux"
    SUDO="sudo"
elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then
    OS="darwin"
    SUDO=""
else
    echo -e "${RED}❌ SO não suportado: $OSTYPE${NC}"
    exit 1
fi
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ SO detectado: $OS${NC}"

# 2. Instalar dependências
echo -e "${BLUE}[2/10] Instalando dependências...${NC}"
if [ "$OS" == "linux" ]; then
    $SUDO apt-get update
    $SUDO apt-get install -y curl git wget unzip jq openssl openssh-server
elif [ "$OS" == "darwin" ]; then
    which brew >/dev/null || /bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"
    brew install curl git wget unzip jq openssl openssh
fi
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Dependências instaladas${NC}"

# 3. Instalar Node.js (v18+)
echo -e "${BLUE}[3/10] Instalando Node.js v18...${NC}"
if ! command -v node &> /dev/null; then
    if [ "$OS" == "linux" ]; then
        curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_18.x | $SUDO -E bash -
        $SUDO apt-get install -y nodejs
    elif [ "$OS" == "darwin" ]; then
        brew install node@18
        brew link node@18 --force
    fi
fi
node --version
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Node.js instalado$(node --version)${NC}"

# 4. Instalar Docker & Docker Compose
echo -e "${BLUE}[4/10] Instalando Docker & Docker Compose...${NC}"
if ! command -v docker &> /dev/null; then
    if [ "$OS" == "linux" ]; then
        $SUDO apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose
        $SUDO usermod -aG docker $USER
        $SUDO systemctl start docker
        $SUDO systemctl enable docker
    elif [ "$OS" == "darwin" ]; then
        brew install --cask docker
        open /Applications/Docker.app
        echo "⏳ Aguarde Docker iniciar (30s)..."
        sleep 30
    fi
fi
docker --version
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Docker instalado$(docker --version)${NC}"

# 5. Instalar PM2
echo -e "${BLUE}[5/10] Instalando PM2...${NC}"
npm install -g pm2
pm2 -v
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ PM2 instalado$(pm2 -v)${NC}"

# 6. Clonar repositório Titanio
echo -e "${BLUE}[6/10] Clonando repositório Titanio...${NC}"
TITANIO_DIR="/opt/titanio"
if [ ! -d "$TITANIO_DIR" ]; then
    $SUDO mkdir -p $TITANIO_DIR
    $SUDO chown $USER:$USER $TITANIO_DIR
    cd $TITANIO_DIR
    git clone https://github.com/seu-org/titanio-ma.git .
else
    cd $TITANIO_DIR
    git pull origin main
fi
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Repositório clonado em $TITANIO_DIR${NC}"

# 7. Instalar dependências do projeto
echo -e "${BLUE}[7/10] Instalando dependências Node do projeto...${NC}"
cd $TITANIO_DIR
npm install
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Dependências instaladas${NC}"

# 8. Configurar variáveis de ambiente
echo -e "${BLUE}[8/10] Configurando .env...${NC}"
if [ ! -f "$TITANIO_DIR/.env" ]; then
    cat > "$TITANIO_DIR/.env" << 'EOF'
NODE_ENV=production
LOG_LEVEL=info

# Database
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=titanio_ma
DB_USER=titanio
DB_PASSWORD=CHANGE_ME_SECURE_PASSWORD

# Services
OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=18789
DASHBOARD_BACKEND_PORT=3001
DASHBOARD_FRONTEND_PORT=3000
N8N_PORT=5678
UPTIME_KUMA_PORT=3001

# JWT
JWT_SECRET=CHANGE_ME_SECURE_JWT_SECRET

# Backup
BACKUP_SCHEDULE="0 0 * * *"
BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS=30
EOF
    echo -e "${RED}⚠️  .env criado com valores padrão — EDITE EM PRODUÇÃO!${NC}"
    echo "    Arquivo: $TITANIO_DIR/.env"
fi
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ .env configurado${NC}"

# 9. Instalar systemd service (Linux)
if [ "$OS" == "linux" ]; then
    echo -e "${BLUE}[9/10] Criando systemd service...${NC}"
    $SUDO tee /etc/systemd/system/titanio.service > /dev/null << EOF
[Unit]
Description=Titanio Services
After=network.target docker.service
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=$TITANIO_DIR
User=$USER
ExecStart=$TITANIO_DIR/scripts/start-services.sh
ExecStop=$TITANIO_DIR/scripts/stop-services.sh
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
    $SUDO systemctl daemon-reload
    $SUDO systemctl enable titanio
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Systemd service criado${NC}"
fi

# 10. Iniciar serviços
echo -e "${BLUE}[10/10] Iniciando serviços...${NC}"
cd $TITANIO_DIR
docker-compose up -d
pm2 start ecosystem.config.js
pm2 save
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Serviços iniciados${NC}"

# Resumo final
echo ""
echo

recentTasks.title: Crie COMPLETO o ecosystem.config.js do PM2 para Mac Mini Titanio com: openclaw-gateway (:18789), dashboard-backend (:4444), dashboard-frontend (:3000), n8n (:5678), auto_trader.py, monitor.py, memory-watchdog.sh. Inclua max_memory_restart, log rotation, env vars. Também: config do Monit para healthcheck HTTP de cada serviço. E script de instalação completo.
recentTasks.result:
# Ecosystem PM2 + Monit Completo — Relatório de Execução

Vou criar a configuração **completa e pronta para produção** do PM2 + Monit para Mac Mini Titanio com todos os serviços. Executando agora.

---

## 📋 ARQUIVOS ENTREGUES

### 1️⃣ **ecosystem.config.js** (PM2)

```javascript
module.exports = {
  apps: [
    // ========== OPENCLAW GATEWAY ==========
    {
      name: 'openclaw-gateway',
      script: './index.js',
      cwd: '/opt/services/openclaw-gateway',
      instances: 1,
      exec_mode: 'fork',
      port: 18789,
      env: {
        NODE_ENV: 'production',
        PORT: 18789,
        LOG_LEVEL: 'info',
      },
      max_memory_restart: '512M',
      error_file: '/var/log/pm2/openclaw-gateway-error.log',
      out_file: '/var/log/pm2/openclaw-gateway-out.log',
      log_date_format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z',
      merge_logs: true,
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 10,
      min_uptime: '10s',
      watch: false,
      ignore_watch: ['node_modules', '.git', 'logs'],
      listen_timeout: 10000,
      kill_timeout: 5000,
    },

    // ========== DASHBOARD BACKEND ==========
    {
      name: 'dashboard-backend',
      script: './server.js',
      cwd: '/opt/services/dashboard-backend',
      instances: 1,
      exec_mode: 'fork',
      port: 4444,
      env: {
        NODE_ENV: 'production',
        PORT: 4444,
        DATABASE_URL: process.env.DATABASE_URL || 'postgresql://...',
        SUPABASE_URL: process.env.SUPABASE_URL,
        SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY,
        SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE: process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE,
        GITHUB_TOKEN: process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN,
        LOG_LEVEL: 'info',
      },
      max_memory_restart: '1G',
      error_file: '/var/log/pm2/dashboard-backend-error.log',
      out_file: '/var/log/pm2/dashboard-backend-out.log',
      log_date_format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z',
      merge_logs: true,
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 10,
      min_uptime: '10s',
      watch: false,
      ignore_watch: ['node_modules', '.git', 'logs'],
      listen_timeout: 10000,
      kill_timeout: 5000,
    },

    // ========== DASHBOARD FRONTEND ==========
    {
      name: 'dashboard-frontend',
      script: 'serve -s build -l 3000',
      cwd: '/opt/services/dashboard-frontend',
      instances: 1,
      exec_mode: 'fork',
      port: 3000,
      env: {
        NODE_ENV: 'production',
        PORT: 3000,
        REACT_APP_API_URL: 'http://localhost:4444',
        REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: 'http://localhost:4444',
      },
      max_memory_restart: '512M',
      error_file: '/var/log/pm2/dashboard-frontend-error.log',
      out_file: '/var/log/pm2/dashboard-frontend-out.log',
      log_date_format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z',
      merge_logs: true,
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 10,
      min_uptime: '10s',
      watch: false,
      listen_timeout: 10000,
      kill_timeout: 5000,
    },

    // ========== N8N ==========
    {
      name: 'n8n',
      script: '/usr/local/bin/n8n',
      args: 'start',
      instances: 1,
      exec_mode: 'fork',
      port: 5678,
      env: {
        NODE_ENV: 'production',
        N8N_PORT: 5678,
        N8N_PROTOCOL: 'http',
        N8N_HOST: '0.0.0.0',
        N8N_PATH: '/',
        N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY: process.env.N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY || 'change-me-in-production',
        N8N_DB: 'sqlite',
        N8N_DB_SQLITE_FILE: '/opt/data/n8n/n8n.db',
        N8N_LOGS_LEVEL: 'info',
      },
      max_memory_restart: '2G',
      error_file: '/var/log/pm2/n8n-error.log',
      out_file: '/var/log/pm2/n8n-out.log',
      log_date_format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z',
      merge_logs: true,
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 10,
      min_uptime: '10s',
      watch: false,
      listen_timeout: 15000,
      kill_timeout: 10000,
    },

    // ========== AUTO_TRADER.PY ==========
    {
      name: 'auto-trader',
      script: '/usr/local/bin/python3',
      args: '/opt/services/auto_trader.py',
      instances: 1,
      exec_mode: 'fork',
      env: {
        PYTHONUNBUFFERED: 1,
        API_KEY: process.env.TRADER_API_KEY,
        API_SECRET: process.env.TRADER_API_SECRET,
        LOG_LEVEL: 'INFO',
      },
      max_memory_restart: '1G',
      error_file: '/var/log/pm2/auto-trader-error.log',
      out_file: '/var/log/pm2/auto-trader-out.log',
      log_date_format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z',
      merge_logs: true,
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 5,
      min_uptime: '10s',
      watch: false,
      listen_timeout: 10000,
      kill_timeout: 5000,
    },

    // ========== MONITOR.PY ==========
    {
      name: 'monitor',
      script: '/usr/local/bin/python3',
      args: '/opt/services/monitor.py',
      instances: 1,
      exec_mode: 'fork',
      env: {
        PYTHONUNBUFFERED: 1,
        MONITOR_INTERVAL: 30,
        ALERT_THRESHOLD_CPU: 80,
        ALERT_THRESHOLD_MEMORY: 85,
      },
      max_memory_restart: '512M',
      error_file: '/var/log/pm2/monitor-error.log',
      out_file: '/var/log/pm2/monitor-out.log',
      log_date_format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z',
      merge_logs: true,
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 5,
      min_uptime: '10s',
      watch: false,
      listen_timeout: 10000,
      kill_timeout: 5000
